scripts.clean:dist: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$dist='dist'; if(Test-Path $dist){ $exes=Get-ChildItem -Path $dist -File -Filter *.exe | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending; if($exes.Count -gt 0){ $keep=$exes[0].FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path $dist -Force | Where-Object { $_.FullName -ne $keep } | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force } else { Get-ChildItem -Path $dist -Force | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force } }"
